subcodes.title: Madinatu'r-Rida (the City of Radiant Acquiescence)
subcodes.first_line: Remind his servant of God's clemency in truth, that he might be honored thereby among the concourse of the worlds, and might give thanks to his lord at all times, insofar as God's bounties to him
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر رحمه الله عبده بالحق لیفتخر بذلک فی ملا العالین و یشکر ربه فی کل حین
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for forgiveness, @symbolism of color and light, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for protection, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God
